name: CONFIG — Global Settings
description: Single source of truth for the IntraWeb OS: owner, Google (Sheets, Drive, Maps, Chat), timing, scoring, tier pricing, leadSourcing.minScoreForHubSpot, Hunter, industries, and leadSourcingQueries. Secrets: Data table CONFIG_secrets (columns hunterApiKey, mapsApiKey, chatWebhookUrl) — no $env. Code node cannot read n8n Credentials; use Data table, or HTTP Request/Postgres with a credential before Code. Called via Execute Workflow from every system workflow.

parameters.content:
## CONFIG — Global Settings

This workflow is the **single source of truth** for all shared settings used by the IntraWeb OS. It is called by every other workflow via *Execute Workflow*.

**Testing:** Use **Manual Trigger** → *Test workflow* on this canvas. n8n does not allow standalone runs when the only entry point is *Execute Workflow Trigger*.

**What it does:**
- Exposes owner info (name, phone, email, company, Calendly, payment link + Stripe test payment links by offer)
- Google settings (master sheet ID, Drive folder, Chat webhook)
- Timing (follow-up delays, invoice reminders, health check cadence)
- Scoring thresholds (hot/warm lead, health warning)
- **Lead sourcing:** `leadSourcing.minScoreForHubSpot` — minimum Maps lead score (0–10) before SYS 01 syncs a scraped lead to HubSpot (`0` = all leads; `4` = warm+ only, legacy)
- **HubSpot:** `hubspot.pipelineId` (optional) and `hubspot.dealStageIds` — values must match what HubSpot sends on **dealstage** webhooks (usually **numeric** IDs from Pipelines API, or strings like `closedwon` / `closedlost`). **Never** use display names or guesses like `contractsent` for `contractSent` — paste the real stage **id** from **Settings → Deals → Pipelines** or `GET .../pipelines/deals/{id}/stages`. Leave `contractSent` as `''` until set.
- Tier pricing (Starter, Growth, Ops)
- Lead sourcing queries and industry list

**Secrets (Data table — works with env blocking on):** In **Data tables**, create a table named **`CONFIG_secrets`** with three **text** columns: `hunterApiKey`, `mapsApiKey`, `chatWebhookUrl`. Add **one row** with your real values. The **Load secrets (Data table)** node loads the first row (`limit` 1). If you rename the table, open that node and pick the correct table. Do not commit secrets in workflow JSON.

**n8n Credentials:** The **Code** node **cannot** read credentials (`getCredentials` / `$getCredentials` are not supported there — see [Code node common issues](https://docs.n8n.io/code/code-node/#common-issues)). To use **Header Auth**, **Postgres**, etc., insert an **HTTP Request** (GET a private JSON secrets URL) or **Postgres** (SELECT one row) **between** the trigger and **Return Config**, wire it instead of the Data table node, and map fields into the same three keys the Code expects.

**Usage:** Import this workflow first. Replace no hardcoded values in other workflows — they all read from here.
